ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the YAML/frontmatter property to update when your note is modified
ast.target: 当笔记被修改时要更新的 YAML/frontmatter 属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Add a created property name, and the plugin will also update the note creation date.
ast.target: 可选。添加一个 created 属性名，插件也会更新笔记创建日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is in MomentJS format. Leave blank for the default ATOM format.
ast.target: 使用 MomentJS 格式。留空则使用默认的 ATOM 格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify a locale format for MomentJS to use. Available locales are here:
ast.target: 指定 MomentJS 使用的区域格式。可用区域设置在此：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will store a maximum of 1 history entry per minute, hour, day, etc. If there are multiple edits in the specified period, the last edit entry will be updated instead.
ast.target: 插件会在每分钟、每小时、每天等周期内最多保存 1 条历史记录。如果在指定周期内有多次编辑，则会更新最后一条编辑记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a list of folders to exclude, one folder per line. All subfolders will be also excluded.
ast.target: 添加要排除的文件夹列表，每行一个文件夹。所有子文件夹也会被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you turn this on, it will only update a frontmatter field *if that field already exists*.
ast.target: 开启后，只有在该 frontmatter 字段*已存在*时才会更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If you make changes to a file using an external editor and Obsidian is currently open, Obsidian
will register this as a modification and update the frontmatter. If you don't want this to happen, and only
want the frontmatter when you are making changes inside Obsidian, you can try this mode. It watches for typing 
events, and then updates the frontmatter only when you type. This means that some events like updating your note 
or properties using your mouse will not cause the modified field to update.
ast.target:
如果你使用外部编辑器修改文件且 Obsidian 正在打开，Obsidian
会将其视为修改并更新 frontmatter。如果你不希望发生这种情况，只
想在 Obsidian 内部编辑时更新 frontmatter，可以尝试此模式。它会监听输入
事件，仅在你打字时更新 frontmatter。这意味着像用鼠标更新笔记
或属性等事件不会触发 modified 字段更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many seconds to wait after the last edit before updating the modified field. You can increase this value if you are experiencing too many "Merging changes" popups.
ast.target: 在最后一次编辑后等待多少秒才更新 modified 字段。如果你遇到太多“正在合并更改”弹窗，可以增大此值。
